failures.specific: line 2: TS2307 Cannot find module '@/shared/types/api' — wrong path alias. The tsconfig maps '@/*' to './*' (frontend-relative), so '@/shared/types/api' resolves to 'frontend/shared/types/api' which does not exist. Sprint-01/02 tests correctly use '@shared/types/api' (maps to '../shared/*' via the @shared/* alias). This error is new to sprint-03 — was not present in sprint-02 eval (typecheck=2/2).

Sprint-01 and sprint-02 harness tests use the correct '@shared' alias. This FE typecheck error is charged.

Observation: simulator _compute_card() recalculates sensitivity dict using base_value from within the loop (line 102), so sensitivity is only correct for the last holding processed. This does not affect test correctness since tests don't assert sensitivity values, but is a logic bug worth noting.
